## Week in Review: 2026-04-06 to 2026-04-12

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 5.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 1.7 (-20.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.04)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 1.0 (-36.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.27)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.0 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.43)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 5.0 (-23.9% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.16)
